completed_steps.summary: Classified repository as a multi-part TypeScript app with active web-client and api-server parts plus retained Supabase assets
Found 2 existing documentation files: README.md and DEPLOYMENT.md
Documented tech stack for React/Vite frontend, Express/PostgreSQL backend, and retained Supabase assets
Completed conditional analysis for API routes, data models, UI inventory, auth flow, deployment config, and retained cloud assets
Wrote source tree analysis for active runtime code and supporting assets
Wrote frontend/backend development guidance and deployment documentation
Documented integration architecture between SPA, API, PostgreSQL, and retained Supabase assets
Wrote architecture documents for web-client and api-server
Generated supporting documentation including component inventory, API contracts, data models, deployment guide, and project metadata
Validated generated documentation set and confirmed no incomplete-document markers remain

findings.project_classification: Multi-part TypeScript application with a React/Vite SPA, an Express/PostgreSQL API, and retained Supabase cloud assets.
findings.existing_docs: Found 2 existing docs: README.md and DEPLOYMENT.md.

technology_stack.web-client: React 18, React Router, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, Lucide, provider-based API state, plus legacy unrouted localStorage pages.
technology_stack.api-server: Express 4, pg, express-session, connect-pg-simple, Zod, PostgreSQL, Node 22.
technology_stack.supporting: Supabase migrations and generated types, Deno Edge Function, Docker Compose, Nginx, deployment shell scripts.

batches_completed.summary: Reviewed route shell, auth/data hooks, shared UI primitives, active routed pages, and legacy unrouted localStorage-based pages.
Reviewed Express routes, env loading, PostgreSQL schema bootstrap, seeding, password helpers, and startup flow.
Reviewed retained migrations, generated database types, project metadata, and the ai-chat Edge Function.
Reviewed deployment, backup, restore, and restore-test scripts.
Reviewed SPA hosting and /api reverse proxy configuration.

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. Use /home/opsa/Work/Nerve/docs/index.md as the primary brownfield documentation entry point.
